subnetResourceId.// REPLACE: Resource ID of the APIM subnet, e.g. /subscriptions/<sub>/resourceGroups/<rg>/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/<vnet>/subnets/<subnet>

auth0TenantDomain.// REPLACE: Your Auth0 tenant domain, no scheme/trailing slash. Empty = the validate-auth0-jwt policy fragment cannot resolve its named values.

auth0Audience.// REPLACE: The Auth0 API Identifier the access tokens must be issued for, e.g. https://api.contoso.example

enableDelegation.// REPLACE: true to deploy the Key Vault + App Service shell + portalsettings/delegation config for the BYO Auth0 delegation handler.

delegationHandlerUrl.// REPLACE: Optional public URL of the delegation handler. Leave empty to default to the provisioned App Service hostname.

delegationValidationKey.// REPLACE: Required when enableDelegation=true. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 48. Prefer supplying via az deployment ... --parameters delegationValidationKey=...

auth0ClientSecret.// REPLACE: Required when enableDelegation=true. Auth0 application client secret. Prefer supplying via az deployment ... --parameters auth0ClientSecret=...

auth0ClientId.// REPLACE: Required when enableDelegation=true. Auth0 application client ID (public, not a secret). Visible in the Auth0 application Settings page.
